title: CCF Server
description:
Server Side  altered list for my modpack Create Cobble Fire linked in description.

Merges Create Mod with Cobblemon, Ice and Fire, And Iron's Spells and spellbooks for a truely unique mix of Steampunk meets Fantasy along side Pokemon.
body:
Merging to creativity of Create with the Adventures of Cobblemon and bringing fantasies to life using the likes of Ice and Fire and Iroon's Spells and Spellbooks, Create Cobbled Fire brings minecraft to life in a truely unique way.

  Use the create mod to build large factories, automate anything, or travel the skies with your new jetpack.

  Explore the continents, searching for rare and unique Cobblemon, with the single goal, to catch them all.

  Learn the mystic arts and make your enemies fear your overwelming presence, crumble cities, level mountains, and destroy all who oppose you.

  though be careful, there are dangerous beasts in this world. Cyclops, wyverns, Dragons and so much more that can snatch you up and eat you whole.

  there are an assortment of building mods, enhanced fighting with the use of the Better Combat mod, several Cobblemon and Create addons, enhanced visuals, and modified weather using Simple Clouds mod.

Client Version https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-cobbled-fire
